title: clitoria javitensis var. javitensis
intro: Clitoria javitensis var. javitensis, commonly known as Butterfly Pea or Blue Pea, is a variety of flowering plant native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clitoria javitensis var. javitensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cognitive function, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or supplements, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
